user.title: Digital Pendulum Setup
user.description: The pendulum will work between the start and end hours set

data.use_half_hour_chime: Use dedicated half hour chime sound

data_description.player_type: Select your device type (Alexa, Google Home, or Generic)
data_description.language: Select the language for time announcements. 'Automatic' uses the Home Assistant language setting
data_description.custom_chime_path: E.g.: www/sounds/bell.mp3 (Formats: MP3, WAV, OGG - leave empty for default)
data_description.announce_half_hours_voice: If disabled, the chime will still play at half hours but no voice announcement will be made
data_description.after_chime_delay: Waiting time in seconds between the chime and the voice announcement (default: 1.2)
data_description.use_half_hour_chime: If enabled, a dedicated sound will play at half hours instead of the normal chime
data_description.announce_quarter_hours: If enabled, a dedicated sound will play at :15 and :45 (no voice announcement)
